titleStmt.title: Portland, Ethiopic Manuscript Imaging Project, Mekele Mikael 166
Mekele Mikael 166

editionStmt.p: The initial version of this file was created from data kindly provided by the Ethiopic Manuscript Imaging Project directed by Steve Delamarter.

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msContents.summary: Qerǝllos, ቄርሎስ:, Theological and Christological Works of Cyril of Alexandria and other church fathers, cf. EMML 4448.Ff. i r(ecto)-v(recto): Excerpt from the Synaxarium on the life of Cyril. Ffols. 1r, –46v: On the Orthodox Faith (De recta fide), Bä’ntä Haymanot Rǝt‘ǝt, addressed to Emperor Theodosius. Bernd Manuel Weischer, Qerellos I (= Afrikanische Forschungen 7) Hamburg 1973. F47r, –xxx: That Christ is One, Kama aḥadu Krestos, by Cyril of Alexandria. Bernd Manuel Weischer, Qerellos III: Der Dialog “Dass Christus einer ist” des Kyrillos von Alexandrien (Äthiopistiche Forschungen, Vol. 2) Wiesbaden 1977. F71v, -73r: Homily by Theodotus of Ancyra, Weicher, ibid. 122–33 F73r, -73v: Homily by Severus of Synnada, Weischer, ibid. 62–7. F73v, –74v: Homily by Acacius of Melitene, Weischer, ibid. 68–81. F74v, -75v: Homily by Juvenalius of Jerusalem, Weischer, ibid. 82–7. F75v, -76v: Homily by Cyril of Alexandria, Weicher, ibid. 88–99. F76v, -77r: Homily by Rheginus of Constantinople, Weicher, ibid. 100–7. F77r, -78r: Homily by Cyril of Alexandria, Weicher, ibid. 108–17. F78rv, : Homily by Eusiebius of Heraclea, Weicher, ibid. 117–21. F78v, -79v: Homily by Theodotus of Ancyra, Weicher, ibid. 122–33. F79v, : Homily by Firmus of Caesarea, Weicher, ibid. 134–137. F79v, -80r: Epistle of the Synod of Ephesus to John of Antioch, Weicher, ibid. 138–141. F80r, : Homily by Cyril of Alexandria, Weicher, ibid. 142–145. F80r, -81r: Epistle of John of Antioch to Cyril of Alexandria, Weicher, ibid. 146–153. F81r, -82v: Epistle of Cyril of Alexandria to John of Antioch, Weicher, ibid. 153–169. F82v, -84v: Homily by Epiphanius of Cyprus. Bernd Manuel Weischer, Qerellos IV 2: Traktate des Epiphanius von Zypern und des Proklos von Kyzikos. AF 6 (Wiesbaden, 1979) 24–47. F84v, -85r: Homily by Epiphanius of Cyprus on the Trinity, Weicher, ibid. 52–58. F85r, -87r: Homily by Proclus of Cyzicus, Weicher, ibid. 64–87. F87r, -90v: Homily by Severianus of Gabala. Bernd Manuel Weischer, Qerellos IV 3: Traktate des Severianos Von Gabala, Gregorios Thaumaturgus und Kyrillos von Alexandrien. AF 7 (Wiesbaden, 1980) 22–67. F90v, -91r: The Faith of Gregory Thaumaturgus, Weischer, ibid. 70–77. F91r, -92v: The first homily of Cyril of Alexandria on Melchisedec, Weischer, ibid. 82–97. F92v, -94r: The second homily of Cyril of Alexandria on Melchisedec, Weischer, ibid. 98–117. F94rv, : Homily by a Sage on Melchisedec. Bernd Manuel Weischer, “Die äthiopischen Psalmen- und Qerlosfragmente in Evevan/Armenien,” Oreiens Christianus 53 (1969) 142–143. F94v, : On the 318 Orthodox Fathers, Weischer, ibid. 143–144. F94v, -95r: On the Nativity and Life of Our Lord, Weischer, ibid. 144–145. F95rv, : Confession of faith, Weischer, ibid, 146. F95v-96r: Closing prayer, mentioning the owner, but erased. Closing scribal note mentioning the day the book was started (the 12th night of Ṭǝrr) and completed on a Friday in Mäggabit.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created XML record from EMIP Collection Metadata.xsls
